required_preferences.fact: Stands and performs prescribed gentle stretching and heat/ice therapy at designated intervals — avoids routine hourly stretches and limits desk time to 30-minute blocks until cleared for normal activity

supersedes.fact: Stands and stretches for five minutes every hour at her desk — never sits for more than two hours straight

required_preferences.fact: No longer attends afternoon meetings or partnership briefings in person; participates virtually or reschedules all such events to mornings to comply with daily 3pm school pickup.

supersedes.fact: Attends afternoon meetings and partnership briefings with nonprofit sector leaders at least twice a month — avoids scheduling during school pick-up hours.

required_preferences.fact: Does video calls with her college friends every other Sunday evening instead of group texts

Plans weeknight family dinners around heart-healthy, non-fried, minimally processed recipes — introduces new plant-based dishes and avoids serving traditional comfort foods unless approved by her doctor
Limits evening social gatherings during spouse's absence, preferring at-home leisure time with daughter
Prefers quick, weeknight dinners (30 minutes or less) to accommodate the early school pickup and homework time, no longer experimenting with new recipes or elaborate meals on weekdays.

persona: A mid-career accountant at a regional firm specializing in nonprofit organizations
